metadata.title: Paste image rename
metadata.description: Rename pasted images and all the other attchments added to the vault

regex.source: Notice(`Failed to rename ${newName}: no active editor`)
regex.target: Notice(`重命名 ${newName} 失败: 没有活动编辑器`)

regex.source: Notice("Failed to batch rename images: the generated name is not meaningful")
regex.target: Notice("批量重命名图像失败：生成的名称没有意义")

regex.source: name: "Batch rename embeded files (in the current file)"
regex.target: name: "批量重命名嵌入文件（在当前文件中）"

regex.source: name: "Batch rename all images instantly (in the current file)"
regex.target: name: "立即批量重命名所有图像（在当前文件中）"

regex.source: .setDesc("Please input the name pattern to match files (regex)")
regex.target: .setDesc("请输入用于匹配文件的名称模式（正则表达式）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Please input the extension pattern to match files (regex)")
regex.target: .setDesc("请输入用于匹配文件的扩展名模式（正则表达式）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Please input the string to replace the matched name (use $1, $2 for regex groups)")
regex.target: .setDesc("请输入用于替换匹配名称的字符串（使用 $1, $2 作为正则表达式组）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Please input the new name for the image (without extension)")
regex.target: .setDesc("请输入图像的新名称（不带扩展名）")

regex.source: .setDesc(`If enabled, duplicate number will be added at the start as prefix for the image name, otherwise it will be added at the end as suffix for the image name.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果启用，重复数字将作为前缀添加到图像名称的开头，否则将作为后缀添加到图像名称的结尾。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`The delimiter to generate the number prefix/suffix for duplicated names. For example, if the value is "-", the suffix will be like "-1", "-2", "-3", and the prefix will be like "1-", "2-", "3-". Only characters that are valid in file names are allowed.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`生成重复名称的数字前缀/后缀的分隔符。例如，如果值为"-"，后缀将类似于"-1"、"-2"、"-3"，前缀将类似于"1-"、"2-"、"3-"。仅允许文件名中有效的字符。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`If enabled, duplicate number will always be added to the image name. Otherwise, it will only be added when the name is duplicated.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`如果启用，重复数字将始终添加到图像名称。否则，只有在名称重复时才会添加。`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`By default, the rename modal will always be shown to confirm before renaming, if this option is set, the image will be auto renamed after pasting.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`默认情况下，重命名模态将始终显示以确认重命名，如果设置了此选项，图像将在粘贴后自动重命名。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`By default, the plugin only handles images that starts with "Pasted image " in name,
			which is the prefix Obsidian uses to create images from pasted content.
			If this option is set, the plugin will handle all attachments that are created in the vault.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`默认情况下，插件仅处理名称以"Pasted image "开头的图像，
			这是Obsidian用于从粘贴内容创建图像的前缀。
			如果设置了此选项，插件将处理在库中创建的所有附件。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`This option is only useful when "Handle all attachments" is enabled.
			Write a Regex pattern to exclude certain extensions from being handled. Only the first line will be used.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`此选项仅在启用"处理所有附件"时有用。
			写一个正则表达式模式以排除某些扩展名的处理。仅使用第一行。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Turn off this option if you don't want to see the notice when renaming images.
			Note that Obsidian may display a notice when a link has changed, this option cannot disable that.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果您不想在重命名图像时看到通知，请关闭此选项。
			请注意，当链接发生更改时，Obsidian可能会显示通知，此选项无法禁用。`)

regex.source: `Are you sure? This will rename all the ${this.state.renameTasks.length} images matched the pattern.`
regex.target: `您确定吗？这将重命名所有匹配模式的 ${this.state.renameTasks.length} 张图像。`

regex.source: The pattern indicates how the new name should be generated.
regex.target: 该模式指示新名称应如何生成。

regex.source: name of the active file, without ".md" extension.
regex.target: 活动文件的名称，不带 ".md" 扩展名。

regex.source: this variable is read from the markdown file's frontmatter, from the same key "imageNameKey".
regex.target: 此变量从markdown文件的前言部分读取，来自同一键 "imageNameKey"。

regex.source: use "$FORMAT" to format the current date, "$FORMAT" must be a Moment.js format string, e.g. {{DATE:YYYY-MM-DD}}.
regex.target: 使用 "$FORMAT" 格式化当前日期， "$FORMAT" 必须是Moment.js格式字符串，例如 {{DATE:YYYY-MM-DD}}。

regex.source: Here are some examples from pattern to image names (repeat in sequence), variables: fileName = "My note", imageNameKey = "foo":
regex.target: 以下是从模式到图像名称的示例（按顺序重复），变量：fileName = "My note"，imageNameKey = "foo"：

regex.source: My note, My note-1, My note-2
regex.target: My note, My note-1, My note-2
debugLog("根据扩展名排除的文件"
debugLog("当前行 -> 替换后的行"
